name: AlexSulliMora-Marketplace
description: Personal plugin marketplace. Ships the deep-review cascade and the paper-extension academic-paper pipeline, with shared style preferences.

plugins.name: deep-review
plugins.description: Tiered creator/reviewer cascade for thorough multi-axis review of drafts, code, and documents. Provides /deep-review:review-document, the reviewer agents, shared scripts, and a preferences directory that controls scoring, severity calibration, and style rules.

plugins.name: paper-extension
plugins.description: Analyze academic economics papers and propose research extensions with structured creator/reviewer workflows. Depends on deep-review for the review cascade and the preferences files.
